## Summary

- Describe what changed
- Explain why the change is needed

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run check` or equivalent subset explained below
- [ ] Additional manual testing described below if needed

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior or workflow changed
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes are called out explicitly
- [ ] Screenshots or recordings are included for UI changes when helpful

## Notes

- Link issues, follow-up work, screenshots, or rollout considerations here
